search.query: |search host="gen-data" index="gen-data" sourcetype="csv" Address_Location="Arkansas, United States" | rename "Recruitment Method" as RecruitmentMethod | eval method_array = split(RecruitmentMethod, ",") | mvexpand method_array | eval RMethod = trim(method_array) | dedup RMethod | where RMethod != "" | table RMethod

|search host="gen-data" index="gen-data" sourcetype="csv" Address_Location="Arkansas, United States" | rename "Transportation Method" as TransportationMethod | eval method_array = split(TransportationMethod, ",") | mvexpand method_array | eval TMethod = trim(method_array) | dedup TMethod | where TMethod != "" | table TMethod

|search host="gen-data" index="gen-data" sourcetype="csv" Address_Location="Arkansas, United States" | rename "Coercion Method" as CoercionMethod | eval method_array = split(CoercionMethod, ",") | mvexpand method_array | eval CMethod = trim(method_array) | dedup CMethod | where CMethod != "" | table CMethod

host="gen-data" index="gen-data" sourcetype="csv" Address_Location="Arkansas, United States" ```| dedup _raw ``` | rename "Coercion Method" as CoercionMethod "Recruitment Method" as RecruitmentMethod "Transportation Method" as TransportationMethod | search ($Recruitment$) AND ($Transportation$) AND ($Coercion$) | eval RecruitmentMethod_mv = split(RecruitmentMethod, ",") | eval TransportationMethod_mv = split(TransportationMethod, ",") | eval CoercionMethod_mv = split(CoercionMethod, ",") | mvexpand RecruitmentMethod_mv | mvexpand TransportationMethod_mv | mvexpand CoercionMethod_mv | eval RecruitmentMethod_single = trim(RecruitmentMethod_mv) | eval TransportationMethod_single = trim(TransportationMethod_mv) | eval CoercionMethod_single = trim(CoercionMethod_mv) | where isnotnull(RecruitmentMethod_single) AND isnotnull(TransportationMethod_single) AND isnotnull(CoercionMethod_single) | stats count by RecruitmentMethod_single TransportationMethod_single CoercionMethod_single | appendpipe [stats count by RecruitmentMethod_single TransportationMethod_single | rename RecruitmentMethod_single as source, TransportationMethod_single as target] | appendpipe [stats count by TransportationMethod_single CoercionMethod_single | rename TransportationMethod_single as source, CoercionMethod_single as target] | search source=* | where count>0 | fields source target count
